description: Task instructions are typed out on the screen, asking the user to book a return domestic flight using the Flight Centre website.
frame_description: A dark screen with white text being typed out line by line.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button to initiate the task and open the Flight Centre website.
frame_description: A dark screen with an 'Open' button in the center.

description: The browser navigates from the instruction page to the Flight Centre homepage.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The browser tab updates and the Flight Centre website begins to load.

description: The Flight Centre homepage content loads, including the main promotional banner and the flight search widget.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The Flight Centre homepage is visible with a 'Tropical Islands Sale' banner and a search form.

description: User clicks on the 'Where to?' destination input field in the search widget.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the destination input field in the flight search widget.

description: A dropdown menu appears showing popular destination suggestions.
frame_description: A dropdown list of cities like Sydney, Melbourne, and Brisbane appears below the destination input.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Sydney, Australia' option in the destination dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor is over the first item in the destination dropdown list.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Melbourne, Australia' option in the destination dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor moves down to the second item in the destination dropdown list.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Brisbane, Australia' option in the destination dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor moves down to the third item in the destination dropdown list.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Perth, Australia' option in the destination dropdown.
frame_description: The cursor moves down to the fourth item in the destination dropdown list.

description: User selects 'Melbourne, Australia' as the destination city.
frame_description: The user clicks on the Melbourne option in the dropdown.

description: The destination input field is updated with the selected city and the dropdown closes.
frame_description: The search widget now shows 'Melbourne, Australia' in the destination field.

description: User hovers the cursor over the 'Search flights' button.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the blue 'Search flights' button on the right side of the widget.

description: User clicks on the date selection field to open the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the field showing the current date range.

description: A date picker modal appears, showing calendars for February and March.
frame_description: A calendar overlay appears over the search widget.

description: User hovers over March 11 in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the number 11 in the March calendar.

description: User hovers over March 17 in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the number 17 in the March calendar.

description: User hovers over March 18 in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the number 18 in the March calendar.

description: User hovers over March 19 in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the number 19 in the March calendar.

description: User hovers over March 20 in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the number 20 in the March calendar.

description: User hovers over March 21 in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the number 21 in the March calendar.

description: User hovers over March 22 in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the number 22 in the March calendar.

description: User hovers over March 23 in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the number 23 in the March calendar.

description: User scrolls horizontally within the date picker or the page to view more dates.
frame_description: The content within the viewport shifts horizontally.

description: User selects March 27 as the departure date.
frame_description: The user clicks on the number 27 in the March calendar.

description: The departure date is updated in the search widget UI.
frame_description: The date field in the search widget reflects the selection of March 27.

description: User clicks on March 20th in the calendar to select a departing date.
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel.
frame_description: The date picker modal is open, showing February and March 2026. The user selects March 20th.

description: The date picker modal updates its header to 'Returning travel dates' after the departure date is selected.
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel.
frame_description: The modal title changes from 'Travel dates' to 'Returning travel dates'.

description: User clicks on March 22nd in the calendar to select a return date.
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel.
frame_description: The user selects March 22nd as the return date in the calendar modal.

description: The cursor lingers over the 'Done' button in the date picker modal.
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the blue 'Done' button at the bottom right of the modal.

description: User clicks the 'Done' button to confirm the selected dates.
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Done' button, closing the date selection modal.

description: The date picker modal closes, returning the user to the main search interface.
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel.
frame_description: The modal disappears, revealing the flight search form with the selected dates populated.

description: The cursor dwells on the 'Search flights' button before clicking.
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the large blue 'Search flights' button.

description: User clicks the 'Search flights' button to initiate the search.
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for travel.
frame_description: The user clicks the search button, triggering a page transition.

description: The page navigates to the search results, showing a loading screen with a progress spinner.
frame_description: A loading screen appears with the text 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' and a progress spinner.

description: The search results page finishes loading, displaying available departing flights.
frame_description: The loading screen disappears, and the list of departing flights from Adelaide to Melbourne is displayed.

description: User scrolls down the list of departing flight results.
frame_description: The user scrolls vertically to view more flight options further down the page.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Select' button for a Virgin Australia flight priced at $127.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the blue 'Select' button for the 6:15am Virgin Australia flight.

description: User clicks the 'Select' button for the chosen departing flight.
frame_description: The user clicks the button, which expands the flight details to show fare options.

description: The UI expands to show 'Select Departing Fare Type' options (Lite, Choice, Flex) for the selected flight.
frame_description: A new section opens below the selected flight showing three different fare categories.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Select' button for the 'Lite' fare option.
frame_description: The cursor dwells on the 'Select' button under the 'Lite' fare column ($127).

description: User clicks the 'Select' button for the 'Lite' fare.
frame_description: The user confirms their fare choice by clicking the select button.

description: A 'Good choice!' loading overlay appears while the system prepares the return flight options.
frame_description: A semi-transparent overlay with a spinner and the text 'Good choice! It's time to choose your flight for your return journey' appears.

description: The page content updates to display 'Select Return Flight' options.
frame_description: The departing flight results are replaced by return flight results from Melbourne to Adelaide.

description: User scrolls down the list of return flight results.
frame_description: The user scrolls through the return flight options to compare prices and times.

description: The cursor hovers over the origin city field ('MEL') in the search bar while the user reviews flight results.
frame_description: Flight search results page showing various flight options from Melbourne to Adelaide.

description: A selection panel for returning flight fare types (Lite, Choice, Flex) expands for flight VA223.
frame_description: The flight card for VA223 expands to show different fare options and their inclusions.

description: User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the 'Lite' fare option on the returning flight.
frame_description: The user selects the $177 Lite fare for the returning flight.

description: A full-screen loading overlay appears with the message 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...'.
frame_description: A white loading screen with a circular progress indicator and 'All Set!' text.

description: The page transitions from the search results to the 'Review trip' summary page.
frame_description: The 'Review trip' page loads, showing the selected departing and returning flight details.

description: The 'Price summary' and 'Add-ons' sections (Seats, Baggage) load and become visible on the Review trip page.
frame_description: The right-hand sidebar with price details and the bottom sections for extras appear on the screen.

description: User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the '24/7 Priority Assistance' add-on in the Online Captain's Pack section.
frame_description: The user adds priority assistance to their booking.

description: User clicks the green 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom of the page to proceed to traveller details.
frame_description: The user confirms their flight selection and add-ons to move to the next step.

description: A loading overlay appears with the message 'Thanks for confirming your flights. Next up, your traveller details...'.
frame_description: A loading screen appears after clicking continue.

description: The page navigates to the traveller information entry screen.
frame_description: The 'Travellers' page loads, initially showing placeholders for the form fields.

description: The traveller details form fields (Title, First name, Last name, Date of birth) load and appear on the page.
frame_description: The input fields for passenger information become visible.

description: Horizontal scroll detected as the page layout settles during loading.
frame_description: The page content shifts slightly to the right.

description: Minor horizontal scroll/shift detected.
frame_description: Subtle horizontal movement of the page content.

description: Minor horizontal scroll/shift detected.
frame_description: Subtle horizontal movement of the page content.
